# Data

Our full database is constructed by using AI to periodically retrieve recently published CO2RR papers. Due to limitations in full-text access and current AI models, some entries in the database may be incomplete or contain errors. Please verify the information independently before use.

You can also access the database [here](https://huggingface.co/datasets/ingramwang/co2rr_data), where more filters and SQL queries are supported. The chart data shown on other pages are selected samples from this database, chosen based on data completeness and the significance of the reported results.

```{=html}
<iframe
  src="https://huggingface.co/datasets/ingramwang/co2rr_data/embed/viewer/default/train"
  frameborder="0"
  width="100%"
  style="height: clamp(560px, calc(100vh - 320px), 900px);"
></iframe>
```
